name: Then and Now
overview: A fictional series starring Elena Charalamboudi and Alexandros Tsouvelas in the leading roles, with the creative team of 5 MINUTE MUM behind the cameras. A series of standalone episodes about two couples, two eras, but one common denominator: human relationships. The beloved duo, through improvisation and caustic scripts, plays the two different couples, then and now. The episodes of the series are self-contained, and in each one we watch simple everyday stories, such as marriage, children, entertainment, buying a car, holidays, and everything related to family. THEN AND NOW has many comical and ethnographic elements, combining laughter with emotion and highlighting the differences and similarities between two eras through the lives of two couples.

trailers.title: ΤΟΤΕ VS ΤΩΡΑ | Trailer | Έρχεται στο νέο πρόγραμμα του ΣΚΑΪ
